languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

languages.text: "Дражайший коллега говорит, что не собирается покидать меня. Боюсь, что мы с ним неразлучны. Если Нунциус вам импонирует, уверены ли вы, что не готовы потерпеть мое присутствие на судне хотя бы ради его общества?"

"My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"
languages.original_text: "Дражайший коллега говорит, что не собирается покидать меня. Боюсь, что мы с ним неразлучны. Если Нунциус вам импонирует, уверены ли вы, что не готовы потерпеть мое присутствие на судне хотя бы ради его общества?"

traits.locale_text: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

"My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

"My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

languages.text: «Mi querido colega dice que no tiene intención de alejarse de mí. Me tempo que somos inseparables. Si tanto le gusta, ¿está segur{mf|o|a} de que no puede tolerar mi presencia en la nave aunque sea solo para conservarlo a él a bordo?».
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

traits.locale_text: «Mi querido colega dice que no tiene intención de alejarse de mí. Me tempo que somos inseparables. Si tanto le gusta, ¿está segur{mf|o|a} de que no puede tolerar mi presencia en la nave aunque sea solo para conservarlo a él a bordo?».

languages.text: “我最亲爱的同僚说，他没有离开我的打算。恐怕我和他是不可分割的。如果您如此喜欢他，那是否愿意为了继续和他相处，也顺便容忍我留在船上？”
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

traits.locale_text: “我最亲爱的同僚说，他没有离开我的打算。恐怕我和他是不可分割的。如果您如此喜欢他，那是否愿意为了继续和他相处，也顺便容忍我留在船上？”

languages.text: « Mon cher collègue dit qu'il n'a aucune intention de m'abandonner. J'ai bien peur que nous ne soyons inséparables. Si vous l'appréciez tant, êtes-vous {mf|certain|certaine} de ne pas pouvoir tolérer ma présence sur le vaisseau, ne serait-ce que pour profiter de sa compagnie ? »
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

traits.locale_text: « Mon cher collègue dit qu'il n'a aucune intention de m'abandonner. J'ai bien peur que nous ne soyons inséparables. Si vous l'appréciez tant, êtes-vous {mf|certain|certaine} de ne pas pouvoir tolérer ma présence sur le vaisseau, ne serait-ce que pour profiter de sa compagnie ? »

languages.text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege sagt, er habe nicht vor, von meiner Seite zu weichen. Ich fürchte, wir beiden sind unzertrennlich. Nachdem Ihr derart von ihm begeistert seid ... seid Ihr Euch sicher, dass Ihr nicht bereit seid, mich auf dem Schiff zu dulden, um ihn in Eurer Nähe zu wissen?"
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

traits.locale_text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege sagt, er habe nicht vor, von meiner Seite zu weichen. Ich fürchte, wir beiden sind unzertrennlich. Nachdem Ihr derart von ihm begeistert seid ... seid Ihr Euch sicher, dass Ihr nicht bereit seid, mich auf dem Schiff zu dulden, um ihn in Eurer Nähe zu wissen?"

languages.text: 「私の大切な同僚は、私のそばを離れるつもりはないと言っています。私と彼は切っても切れない関係なのです。もし、あなたがそんなに彼に惹かれているのなら、彼と一緒にいるためだけにでも、私がこの船にいることを容認していただけないでしょうか」。
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

languages.text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, yanımdan ayrılmaya hiç niyeti olmadığını söylüyor. Korkarım o ve ben ayrılmaz bir ikiliyiz. Ona bu kadar hayransanız sırf onun hatırına benim de gemideki varlığıma katlanamayacağınızdan emin misiniz?"
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague says he has no intention of leaving my side. I am afraid he and I are inseparable. If you are so taken with him, are you certain you would not be willing to tolerate my presence on the ship, if only for the sake of his company?"

traits.locale_text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, yanımdan ayrılmaya hiç niyeti olmadığını söylüyor. Korkarım o ve ben ayrılmaz bir ikiliyiz. Ona bu kadar hayransanız sırf onun hatırına benim de gemideki varlığıma katlanamayacağınızdan emin misiniz?"
